Dupatya odorata is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The health benefits of Dupatya include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and neutralize free radicals in the body. The most common herbal preparations made with Dupatya include tea infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
